creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #14)

> what's the name of the modern hardware, that puts non-RFC compluant
> requirements on ARP packets?

Zyxel GS-1900, perhaps.
Please see:
https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-net@freebsd.org/msg66180.html

Could it be the same problem we are talking about here?
